name: oci-savings-autopilot
description: Read-only OCI FinOps plugin that turns cost exports, inventory, and Cloud Advisor findings into prioritized savings plans.

interface.shortDescription: Find OCI waste and turn it into customer-ready savings actions.
interface.longDescription: OCI Savings Autopilot analyzes exported OCI cost reports, Cloud Advisor recommendations, tags, and offline inventory to produce a savings ledger, implementation backlog, and executive summary. It is read-only by default and focuses on measurable monthly savings, effort, risk, and approval steps.
defaultPrompt: Run OCI Savings Autopilot on exported cost data.
Create a customer savings ledger from OCI reports.
Prioritize quick OCI cost wins with rollback notes.
